news.summary: On June 20, 2025, VivoPower International PLC (NASDAQ: VVPR) completed the initial stage of a US$121 million investment round, with His Royal Highness Prince Abdulaziz bin Turki bin Talal Al Saud leading the funding. The round also involved a group of international investors under Regulation S of the U.S. Securities Act of 1933. This initial phase generated US$60.5 million in gross proceeds for the company.
news.headline: VivoPower closes $60.5M phase of $121M private placement led by Prince Abdulaziz bin Turki bin Talal Al Saud.

news.summary: A global specialty chemicals producer, Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), based in Houston, has been honored with 10 safety awards by the International Carbon Black Association. The accolades are given annually to companies demonstrating exceptional safety performance at their manufacturing facilities. The ICBA commended Orion for establishing the industry standard in employee health and safety. These awards are a component of the association's Safety Recognition Program, where recognition is based on substantiated data from previous records.
news.headline: Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC) wins 10 safety awards from ICBA for superior safety records at manufacturing sites.

news.summary: Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) recently disclosed their 1GT climate private equity strategy's (1GT) investment of $30 million towards spearheading a growth equity funding round for Insight M, a pioneer in affordable methane management solutions within the energy industry. The primary round saw involvement from previous backers DCVC, Climate Investment, and Energy Innovation Capital. Insight M utilizes advanced sensors on aircraft to gather and deliver high-resolution data.
news.headline: Morgan Stanley's 1GT invests $30 million in Insight M for methane solutions in energy sector.

news.summary: Today, Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT) shared an update on the anticipated closure timeline for acquiring Yerbaé Brands Corp. (TSX-V: YERB.U) in Scottsdale, AZ on June 20, 2025. Safety Shot indicated progress towards finalizing the acquisition deal with Yerbaé, a significant move for the company's future growth strategy. The development signifies a strategic step forward that aligns with Safety Shot's business objectives.
news.headline: Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT) updates on acquisition closing with Yerbaé Brands Corp. (TSX-V: YERB.U) in June 2025.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Safe and Green Development Corporation (SGD) announced the appointment of three new members to its Board of Directors following the acquisition of Resource Group US Holdings LLC. The new directors, Bjarne Borg, James D. Burnham, and Anthony M. Cialone, bring extensive experience in real estate development, environmental engineering, private equity, and renewable technologies. This strategic move underscores SGD’s dedication to operational growth and innovation. The appointments aim to shape SGD’s future direction at the board level and capitalize on the expertise and networks of the newly elected directors.
news.headline: Safe and Green Development adds 3 new board members post acquisition of Resource Group US Holdings, promising to boost operational growth.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE), a prominent advanced nuclear energy and technology firm, disclosed a significant development. The company has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Namibia Industrial Development Agency (NIDA). This MoU aims to foster collaboration in the creation of a domestic nuclear fuel supply chain infrastructure in Namibia. Through this partnership, NANO Nuclear and NIDA will work together to explore and develop opportunities in this sector. This initiative underscores NANO Nuclear’s commitment to advancing clean energy solutions and further strengthening the nuclear energy industry.
news.headline: NANO Nuclear and Namibian Govt. signed MoU to develop domestic nuclear fuel supply chain in Namibia.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, West Bancorporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: WTBA), the parent company of West Bank based in West Des Moines, Iowa, announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, July 24, 2025, before the market opens.
news.headline: West Bancorporation, Inc. to release Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025. Nasdaq: WTBA. Call available for investors.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Gaia, Inc. revealed that it will join the iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Summer Investment Conference 2025 on June 24 and 25. During the event, Gaia's CEO, James Calhoun, and CFO, Ned Preston, will present the company's insights on June 24, and engage in individual meetings with investors on June 25. Gaia, recognized for its conscious media offerings, operates under the NASDAQ symbol GAIA. The conference is set to host various participants and is anticipated to be a valuable platform for Gaia to connect with potential investors and share its vision.
news.headline: Gaia to join iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Summer Investment Conf. 2025 on June 24–25, CEO & CFO presenting.

news.summary: A recent study on Emrosi™ (DFD-29) found that the treatment, which consists of 40 mg Minocycline Hydrochloride Modified-Release Capsules comprising of 10 mg immediate release and 30 mg extended release, showed effectiveness in treating rosacea. The study highlighted that this efficacy was consistent regardless of variations in body weight among patients. This indicates that Emrosi™ is a promising treatment option for rosacea patients, offering consistent results irrespective of individual weight differences.
news.headline: Journey Medical Corp to present Emrosi™ data at SDPA 2025 Conference - 40mg Minocycline for rosacea, regardless of body weight.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on June 20, 2025, Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) declared the completion of a non-brokered private placement financing, amassing total gross proceeds of CAD$2,250,000. The Private Placement garnered interest from two strategic institutional investors.
news.headline: Trident Resources Corp completes $2.25M financing with 2 strategic investors in Vancouver.

news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on June 20, 2025, Founder Group Limited, a prominent engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) solutions provider for solar photovoltaic systems in Malaysia under the ticker NASDAQ: FGL, announced that it will remain unaffected by the U.S. Senate panel’s suggestion to gradually eliminate solar power tax credits by 2028. The company assures its investors that this proposed change will not have an impact on its operations, indicating stability and confidence in its future prospects.
news.headline: Founder Group reassures investors that proposed U.S. wind down of solar tax credits by 2028 won't impact the company.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Saratoga Investment Corp., listed on NYSE as SAR, announced their upcoming financial report for the quarter ending May 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released on July 8, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call to review these financial results will take place on July 9, 2025. Specifics for the conference call will be shared closer to the date.
news.headline: Saratoga Investment Corp (NYSE:SAR) to report fiscal Q1 2026 financial results on July 8, 2025, with a conference call on July 9.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Frøya, it was referenced that Kaldvík AS made a stock exchange announcement on June 4, 2025. The announcement detailed a request to hold an extraordinary general meeting to discuss a proposal for initiating an investigation. The Company's initiative aims to address certain matters through the meeting, signifying an important step in their corporate governance. The announcement underscores the significance of this request and sets the stage for potential changes within the organization.
news.headline: Kaldvík AS to hold extraordinary general meeting on 20 June 2025 to consider opening an investigation.
